newsSince: Incrementally positive. EnerSys launched the DataSafe Noir Lithium system for data-center power on June 9 and used its June 11 NYSE Investor Day to detail a data-center/lithium and BESS roadmap, though management guides meaningful revenue contribution only from FY2028. Q4 FY26 results (EPS beat, stock +10%) were May 20-21, pre-window. Stock essentially flat (+0.2%) since June 9.

sources.label: EnerSys Q4 2026 earnings call highlights (DataSafe Noir lithium DC product, Investor Day)
Investing.com: EnerSys earnings up next - can data centers offset motive power drag
EnerSys Investor Day June 11 / record FY results

verdicts.rankRationale: June 9 DataSafe Noir lithium DC launch + June 11 Investor Day roadmap give modest new evidence on exactly this page's 'resilient/backup power for AI data centers' thesis, reinforcing the under-owned reliability angle. Revenue is FY2028+ so impact is small; already rank 2, so hold with a slight score bump.
verdicts.bull: 30%+ DC UPS capacity growth plus a new lithium DC product line extends the under-the-radar AI-power franchise.
verdicts.neutral: DC/lithium tailwind real but revenue contribution is years out; motive-power core still drags.
verdicts.bear: FY26 net income fell ~19%; DC lithium revenue not until FY2028; +51% YTD already prices optimism.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: DataSafe Noir lithium DC orders; UPS refresh cycle
verdicts.primaryRisk: Motive-power weakness; delayed DC lithium ramp; 45X credit dependence
